mapper.select: SELECT verification_id, email, code_hash, expires_at, verified_at, consumed_at, failed_attempts, created_at, updated_at FROM email_verifications WHERE email = #{email}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO email_verifications(email, code_hash, expires_at) VALUES(#{email}, #{codeHash}, #{expiresAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE email_verifications SET code_hash = #{codeHash}, expires_at = #{expiresAt}, verified_at = NULL, consumed_at = NULL, failed_attempts = 0, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE email = #{email}
UPDATE email_verifications SET failed_attempts = failed_attempts + 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE email = #{email}
UPDATE email_verifications SET verified_at = #{verifiedAt}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE email = #{email} AND consumed_at IS NULL

UPDATE email_verifications SET consumed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE email = #{email} AND verified_at IS NOT NULL AND consumed_at IS NULL AND expires_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM email_verifications WHERE (consumed_at IS NOT NULL AND consumed_at < #{threshold}) OR (expires_at < #{threshold})
